what: Combine fused quant stride/contiguity hints with split-K REDUCE_BSN=16
why: v263 was the strongest recent BM on the fused path, while v259 improved the separate split-K reduction path; combining them should preserve the fused win and help the 16x2112x7168 split-K shape.

what: Keep v263 fused-path hints and switch M=256 quant scale stores to .wt
why: v263 wins on the M=32 fused shapes, while repeated historical BM runs showed .wt on the two-phase scale stores helps the separate M=256 path. The changes are disjoint, so this is a cleaner combination than the split-K reduce16 branch.
override: Prior .wt scale-store attempts were on older baselines; this combines the best recent fused-path branch with the only consistently positive two-phase tweak.
